/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -mwindows -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o AdasGooner.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libAdasGooner.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/AdasGooner.dir/linkLibs.rsp
